content.en:
"Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance!"

Ye Tian had just become the lord of an eternal country, and he didn't know anything about this.

So, he summoned another lord, who informed him of the alliance of the Thousand Mountains Kingdom.

After listening, Ye Tian understood.

It turned out that the Thousand Hills Realm Alliance was the closest eternal realm region to the realm of all gods, and there were thirty-two eternal realms over there.

And the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods is called the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods by the outside world, and the Alliance of the Thousand Mountains Country is also called that, just because the Kingdom of the Thousand Mountains is the most powerful country over there.

And on the side of the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance, there is no existence beyond the Eternal Dao Realm, and the most powerful one is only a half-step breakthrough.

But no one expected that this being, who was expected to transcend the Eternal Dao Realm, would suddenly turn into a demon.

As for the Eternal Realm Realm, "Six-Two-Three" is an organization established by a group of beings beyond the Eternal Dao Realm, in order to better manage the countless realms, but there is no harmony within the Eternal Realm Realm, and they are still competitors to each other.

But there is consensus on some things.

For example, this time to save the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance, the other members of the Realm Court asked the Myriad Gods Kingdom Alliance to come to the rescue, and once they didn't go, the other Realm Court members would have to attack the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods Great Powers.

Therefore, the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods could only hand over the task to Ye Tian and them.

As for the Lord of the Gods himself, he would not deal with such a trivial matter.

After all, building up power is not for the convenience of oneself, if you have to do everything yourself, then what do you do to train your subordinates?

Although Ye Tian and these country lords are not the subordinates of the great masters of the gods, they can also be mobilized at will, and no one dares to refute them.

Subsequently.

One by one, the country lord said the number of people he sent to the Eternal Dao Realm, and they were all strong people who had condensed the Eternal Dao Seed, if they didn't even condense the Eternal Dao Seed, then going to support would only send them to death.

"I'll go and help myself!"

Ye Tian said.

Ye Tian went in person, and the other lords naturally did not object.

If Ye Tianzhen fell, there was a high probability that the demon seed would not destroy the Eternal Decree, but they would have a chance to obtain the Eternal Decree.

It is rare to have a situation like the Lord of Ogu who wants to die and destroy the Eternal Decree.

This second matter was settled, and the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods continued: "In another ten million Dao Era, I will leave the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, and when the time comes, I will hand over the Eternal National Decree to my disciple Qin He, and let him take the position of the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods. "

"What, Lord of the Gods, you're leaving?"

Many lords were shocked.

Although if the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods is here, they have no status, and everything has to be listened to by the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods, but if the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods leaves, there will be no one who is beyond the Eternal Dao on the side of the Alliance of the Ten Thousand Gods!

A total of five beings who have transcended the Eternal Dao Realm have been born on the side of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, but they have all left one by one, and the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods is the oldest and the last to stay here, but he didn't expect to leave now.

"Don't worry, if there's a crisis here, I'll still be back. "

The great kingdom of all gods is the main way.

Seeing this, the other lords didn't say anything, and they knew very well that they couldn't interfere with the decision of the great lord of the gods.

"Okay, just these three things, this meeting can be withdrawn!"

The great kingdom of all gods is the main way.

The other lords retreated and left the kingdom of the gods.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian came back, and then waited for the other lords to make arrangements, and then went to the Thousand Mountains Country Alliance together.

Soon after.

Summons from other lords have arrived, and they are ready.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's duplicate body converged with these country lords and some Eternal Dao Realms, and rushed to the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance together.

"This time, a total of more than 300 Eternal Dao Realm have been sent, all of them are strong people who have condensed the Eternal Dao Body, and these country lords are full of talents!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

On the road.

Many Eternal Dao Realms have maintained a speed, from the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance to the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance, it is not too far, and if you rush over, it will not take too long.

Suddenly.

A band of wind blocked their way.

"It's the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, everyone be careful here, there may be some Eternal Yin Spirits hidden here, and there is still a certain threat to us!"

A lord said.

Eternal Yin Wind Belt, Eternal Yin Spirit.......

It was the first time Ye Tian knew about this, but he didn't ask.

Wow!!!!!

Many Eternal Dao Realms entered the Eternal Yin Wind Belt together, and a stream of Yin Wind power invaded their bodies, and one Eternal Dao Realm urged the Eternal Dao Bodies to resist this force.

Then, they quickly shuttled through this band of wind to cross this band of wind.

Suddenly.

One by one, the eternal yin spirits appeared, and these eternal yin spirits were formless and ignorant.

"Everyone, attack with the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, go and don't attack with your physical body, these Eternal Yin Spirits restrain the power of your physical body!" the other lords reminded.

Ye Tian understood, and then attacked with the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

Thundered!!!!!

One by one, the Eternal Dao Realm made a move, and fought with these Eternal Yin Spirits.

The strength of these Eternal Yin Spirits was not weaker than that of the Eternal Dao Body powerhouses, but the strength of their country lords was still very strong, and they quickly killed all of these Eternal Yin Spirits, but these country lords were not happy.

Because these are only the weakest Eternal Yin Spirits, and it is useless to kill them, they will be bred in the future, and they are almost inexhaustible.

There were many powerhouses who had transcended the Eternal Dao Realm and descended here and killed all the Eternal Yin Spirits in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, but it didn't take long for them to appear again.

After that, there would be no powerhouses beyond the Eternal Dao Realm to clean up these Eternal Yin Spirits.

Next, they were attacked by 0.7 waves of Eternal Yin Spirits, but they all killed or repelled them.

"It's almost time to get out of the Eternal Yin Wind Belt!"

Wow!

Many Eternal Dao Realms were brought out from the Eternal Yin Wind, and only then did they breathe a sigh of relief.

They are also extremely unlucky, when they encounter that kind of top-notch eternal yin spirit, in that case, they will have to take out life-saving things, and they will lose.

"Keep going, it's not far from the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance!"

They continued on their way.

After some time, they finally arrived at the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance.

The eternal realms were seen at a glance, but when they rushed to the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance, what they saw was a ruin.

Obviously, the demon seed is raging, and the situation here is not good.

"Spread out, go and kill the demon seeds, and if you are in danger, call for help from each other!"

A lord said.
